title: narcissus × incomparabilis var. albus
intro: Narcissus × incomparabilis var. albus, also known as White Campernelle jonquil, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family and is a variation of the Narcissus × incomparabilis species. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Narcissus × incomparabilis var. albus include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as bloating and cramps, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health issues.
